hypothesis: Add item_id x store_id x wday smoothed target encoding using a two-step approach: first compute item-store mean (as in exp_0014 best=0.97640), then add wday deviation from that item-store mean. This captures weekday patterns per product-store without the sparse data problem of a full 3-way interaction. The wday deviation is computed as the smoothed mean difference between sales on a given weekday vs the item-store overall mean, giving the model a clean weekday adjustment signal.
